basic_details.job_title: HLL Apprenticeship Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.post_name: Graduate, Diploma, and ITI Trade Apprenticeship Trainee
basic_details.job_location: Kanagala Factory, Kanagala - 591225, Hukkeri Taluk, Belagavi District, Karnataka
basic_details.short_information: HLL Lifecare recruitment 2026 has been announced by HLL Lifecare Limited (HLL) for Apprentice Trainee posts under the Apprentices Act, 1961, at its Kanagala Factory in Belagavi District, Karnataka. The notification (No. HLL/BGM/HR/KFB/03-App/2026, dated 15-07-2026) invites applications for Graduate, Diploma, and ITI Trade Apprenticeship Trainee categories, with the last date to receive applications set for 30-07-2026.

application_fee.details: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the HLL Lifecare apprentice recruitment 2026. Candidates are advised to check the official notification or website for any updates on this.

qualification.details: Graduate Apprenticeship Trainee: BE / B.Tech in Electrical, Mechanical, or Instrumentation. Diploma Apprenticeship Trainee: Diploma in Electrical or Mechanical Engineering. ITI Trade Apprenticeship Trainee: ITI in Fitter, Welder, or Electrician trade.

salary_details.details: Graduate Apprenticeship Trainee: ₹12,300 per month Diploma Apprenticeship Trainee: ₹10,900 per month ITI Trade Apprenticeship Trainee: ₹9,600 per month

selection_process: The notification does not specify a detailed selection process (such as written test
or interview). It does state that meeting the eligibility conditions does not automatically entitle a candidate to be called for Test / Selection & Appointment
and that the decision of management regarding calling candidates for selection will be final.
how_to_apply: Download the prescribed resume format from the official HLL Lifecare website.
Fill in the resume with accurate personal, educational, and category details.
Attach copies of Educational Qualification certificates, Community certificate, and a recent passport-size photograph.
Send the complete application to: The General Manager Operations & Unit Chief, HLL Lifecare Limited, Kanagala - 591225.
Ensure the application reaches within 15 days from the date of publishing the advertisement, i.e., by 30-07-2026.
important_instructions: Candidates should ensure they fulfil the eligibility criteria and that all particulars furnished are correct in all respects. If it is detected at any stage that a candidate does not fulfil the eligibility norms, or has furnished incorrect or false information, or has suppressed material facts, the candidature will stand automatically cancelled. If any such shortcoming is detected even after appointment, the training is liable to be terminated without notice. Candidates have the option to answer or reply in Hindi at the time of interview, if any. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The recruitment process is liable to be stopped or cancelled at any time at the discretion of the company, without assigning any reason, and the company's decision will be final. Management reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates, and no interim correspondence will be entertained.

rows.details: Graduate, Diploma, and ITI Trade Apprenticeship Trainee
Apprenticeship Training under the Apprentices Act, 1961
Kanagala Factory, Kanagala - 591225, Hukkeri Taluk, Belagavi District, Karnataka
Offline (resume with documents sent by post)

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The notification lists three categories of Apprenticeship Trainees under the one-year Apprenticeship Scheme at the Kanagala Factory: Note: The exact number of vacancies for each apprenticeship category is not specified in this notification.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for the HLL Lifecare apprentice recruitment 2026 should keep the following general conditions in mind:

content_sections.heading: Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: Graduate Apprenticeship Trainee: BE / B.Tech in Electrical, Mechanical, or Instrumentation. Diploma Apprenticeship Trainee: Diploma in Electrical or Mechanical Engineering. ITI Trade Apprenticeship Trainee: ITI in Fitter, Welder, or Electrician trade.

content_sections.heading: Stipend / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Graduate Apprenticeship Trainee: ₹12,300 per month Diploma Apprenticeship Trainee: ₹10,900 per month ITI Trade Apprenticeship Trainee: ₹9,600 per month

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the HLL Lifecare apprentice recruitment 2026. Candidates are advised to check the official notification or website for any updates on this.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The notification does not specify a detailed selection process (such as written test, skill test, or interview). It does state that meeting the eligibility conditions does not automatically entitle a candidate to be called for Test / Selection & Appointment, and that the decision of management regarding calling candidates for selection will be final.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Interested candidates should send their resume along with the following documents: Resume in the prescribed format available on the official HLL website Copies of Educational Qualification certificates Community certificate Recent passport-size photograph

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Candidates should ensure they fulfil the eligibility criteria and that all particulars furnished are correct in all respects. If it is detected at any stage that a candidate does not fulfil the eligibility norms, or has furnished incorrect or false information, or has suppressed material facts, the candidature will stand automatically cancelled. If any such shortcoming is detected even after appointment, the training is liable to be terminated without notice. Candidates have the option to answer or reply in Hindi at the time of interview, if any. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The recruitment process is liable to be stopped or cancelled at any time at the discretion of the company, without assigning any reason, and the company's decision will be final. Management reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates, and no interim correspondence will be entertained.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for HLL Lifecare apprentice recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications is 30-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the stipend for HLL Lifecare apprentice trainees?
faq.answer: Graduate Apprenticeship Trainees receive ₹12,300 per month, Diploma Apprenticeship Trainees receive ₹10,900 per month, and ITI Trade Apprenticeship Trainees receive ₹9,600 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for HLL Lifecare apprentice recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 30 years, with age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. How to apply for HLL Lifecare Kanagala apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need to send their resume in the prescribed format, along with copies of educational qualification certificates, community certificate, and a recent passport-size photograph, to the General Manager Operations & Unit Chief, HLL Lifecare Limited, Kanagala – 591225.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for HLL Lifecare apprentice recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the training take place?
faq.answer: Training will take place at the Kanagala Factory, Kanagala – 591225, Hukkeri Taluk, Belagavi District, Karnataka, though candidates may be transferred to other locations during the training period.
